meta.title: David Castel | Full Stack Product Engineer
meta.description: Modern web apps, SaaS, automation, and AI applied to professional software delivery. Product-oriented Full Stack engineering.

hero.headline: I turn ideas into real web apps and SaaS with modern architecture, automation, and AI.
hero.sub: End-to-end digital products: Full Stack engineering, professional shipping, and AI-accelerated delivery for scalable, business-oriented solutions.

about.title: About me
about.leadImageAlt: Illustration: architecture and SaaS product with an elegant, futuristic look.
about.bodyImageAlt: Decorative animation: data flow and AI in a digital environment.
about.p3ImageAlt: Animation: direct approach, building the right solution, and continuous improvement with data and feedback.
about.lead: I design and build digital products that balance technical excellence with business impact.
about.p1: Over the years, I've worked across architecture, backend systems, frontend experiences, automation workflows, and cloud deployments, always focusing on simplicity, reliability, and maintainability.
about.p2: Today, I specialize in modern web applications, SaaS products, and AI-enhanced solutions that help teams move faster and scale with confidence.
about.p3: My approach is straightforward: understand the problem deeply, build the right solution, and continuously improve it through data and feedback.
